## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots.

## Environment
- **Browser:** (e.g., Chrome 120)
- **OS:** (e.g., macOS 14, Windows 11)
- **Device:** (e.g., Desktop, iPhone 15)
